title: URAファイナルズ準決勝にむけて

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: At last, the semifinals are upon us.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale is bound to see the beginning of
new and dramatic stories.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, how do you feel sending your
Umamusume off to the track?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Even up against the talented racers who made it
through the preliminaries, you never doubt her
for a moment!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
And once you've won, I'm sure you'll give her the
most lavish treatment! I'm talking endless praise,
heaps of thanks, a celebratory party at a luxury
hotel...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
And of course, I'll be cheering on
<chrname> as well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At last, the URA Finale semi-finals begin!
